list.txt: - L hébergement était top. Il y avait un.tres beau jacuzzi en faïence mais non utilisable car l eau était glacée, je pense qu'il est agréable lors de forte chaleur, mais ça n a pas été le cas début mai. Comme j ignorai qu'il était compris dans.la location, je n ai pas été déçue car ça n était pas.prevu, sinon je l aurai bien utilisé après nos longues journées de marche! Il y a aussi une piscine sur le toit mais elle n est pas chauffée non plus. En tout cas l endroit est joli et très calme et très frais ! Je recommande vivement !

list.prop: AT-6V Ático c/ Terraza Privada Verano
list.txt: - Had the most lovely few days in Seville, staying at Olga’s place. The room was very clean and comfortable with everything we needed. It was a hot few days, but the aircon worked well and the two outside terraces were a joy in the early mornings and evenings. It is situated in the most charming square and we walked absolutely everywhere- everything was within reach. Olga was very kind and welcoming. Will stay again, when next in Seville- very happy, thank you!

- Olga was a fantastic host! She gave many local recommendations making our trip so much easier. The apartment building was very clean, peaceful, and located in a nice very walkable area. Highly recommend!

list.prop: AT-6V Ático c/ Terraza Privada Verano
list.txt: - Placed in the corner of a cute little square, Olga's place is a great base for exploring Seville. Olga is responsive and friendly, and gave us good tips for different areas. Would gladly stay again!

list.prop: AT-6V Ático c/ Terraza Privada Verano
list.txt: - Wonderful place on a quiet square in a great neighborhood. Olga was incredibly helpful and responsive.
- I felt I travelled back in time
- The flat is beautiful, location is the best, Olga was really helpful and friendly, giving great recommendations. 100% recommend.
- Amazing host, great apartment! Would really recommend staying here!

- We really enjoyed our stay here! Beautiful apartment with so much character and within a great location. A lot of the attractions are within walking distance which was great as we enjoy walking. The apartment was also very clean and comfortable. Olga was very welcoming and super lovely! She made us feel right at home and gave us lots of recommendations for things to do. We will definitely be staying here again on our next visit! Thank you Olga x
- Great host and amazing apartment

- Perfect location in a perfect square. Perfectly restored and decorated. With a perfect host. And perfect roof garden. An intimate and beautiful building and a lovely, well-appointed, stylish, characterful apartment. Olga was delightful and generous and couldn’t do enough to help - with sorting taxis, trains, recommendations; anything. Seville was beautiful and Olgas place was, well, perfect!

- This place is a true gem in Seville! Absolutely do not hesitate booking here! It’s a beautifully decorated, exceptionally clean and centrally located. Host Olga was warm, welcoming, thoughtful…everything. Would definitely stay here anytime I am back in Seville!

- We had such a beautiful stay at Olga's. The apartment was spacious and good value for money, and we could walk everywhere as it was so central. Olga was so kind and always at hand to help and even arranged a taxi for us to the airport. Would definitely recommend!
- Le logement est très bien placé. Olga est une super hôte, très accueillante, souriante et sympathique.

- Olga is a fantastic host with a beautiful place in the heart of Seville. The apartment is beautifully decorated in the perfect location to explore the city on foot. With great local cafes, bars and restaurants on the door step. Would definitely recommend. Olga was so helpful from our first enquiry, to accommodating a check-in in the middle of the night, thanks so much for a great stay.
- A perfect place and a perfect host, what more can I say? Great apartment in a fantastic location and Olga was extremely helpful and friendly. Would definitely recommend!

- This was the perfect home away from home in Seville - very clean, charming, and a wonderful location. Olga was warm, friendly, and helpful, welcoming us at check-in and in the lobby each morning. The rooftop views were wonderful, the building secure, the decor peaceful, all as pictured. We had a lovely time. Thank you, Olga.

- Our stay in Seville was absolutely exceptional from start to finish. Olga was the perfect host warm, friendly, incredibly helpful, and always available with fantastic recommendations for restaurants and must see places around the city. She truly made us feel welcome from the moment we arrived. The apartment itself was beautiful, spotless, and equipped with absolutely everything you could possibly need for a comfortable stay. Every detail had clearly been thought of with care and attention. The roof top pool was the icing on the cake . The location was perfect ,right in the heart of Seville and within easy walking distance of all the main attractions, restaurants, and sights. By the time we left, saying goodbye to Olga felt like saying goodbye to a family member. That says everything about the wonderful experience we had. We would 100% recommend staying here and would return again without hesitation. A genuine 5-star experience in every way . Thank you , Paul & Mandy

- Olga, first of all thank you so much for being such a great host. You went above and beyond my expectations of an Airbnb host. Olga gave us great recommendations of food, nightlife, place to stay away from like tourist traps. Her place is located in the middle of the city so everything is walkable. I highly recommend anyone to stay here ….cant wait to visit again.
- Emplacement idéal. Endroit raffiné, calme et cosy. Accueil chaleureux. Je le recommande à tous les voyageurs

- Nous avons adoré. La localisation est très sympa, le centre de Séville est très facilement accessible à pied, même pour y aller plusieurs fois par jour ce n'est pas un problème. Le logement est beau, très propre, bien décoré, et paisible, nous n'avons eu aucune nuisance sonore. La literie est confortable. Le rooftop est vraiment un plus pour profiter du soleil et de la piscine. Pour un couple qui a besoin de se reposer, c'est vraiment parfait. Enfin, Olga est adorable <3 Mille mercis, nous recommanderons ce logement à nos proches !

- Gracias, Olga. Olga is a wonderful host and we hope to see her again very soon. Absolutely beautiful apartment and great location. Thank you, Olga!! Thanks so much again for letting us stay for Semana Santa 🙏
- Do not hesitate! Everything was perfect from the first moment until the last!

- This was the best Airbnb we have ever stayed in! Our stay here was honestly perfect from start to finish. One thing that meant a lot to us was how comfortable and welcome we felt as a lesbian couple. The apartment was absolutely beautiful! Even better than the photos!! And the roof top is just incredible, could have spent the entire trip up there. The location couldn’t have been better. Everything we wanted to see and do was within walking distance, yet it still felt peaceful and tucked away from the busy crowds. Olga was amazing! She went out of her way to make our stay special. It was my partners birthday so she even arrange a bouquet of flowers and a box of chocolates! This place will always hold special memories for us, and we wouldn’t hesitate to stay here again or recommend it to anyone visiting Seville. Thank you for such a lovely stay 🧡🍊

- We have visited Seville many times but CH apartments was by far our favourite place to stay. Olga was very responsive before out trip and during our stay making us feel at home and part of her home. The apartment was immaculate and had everything we needed. The bathroom was great and we had plenty of room , especially for all my toiletries and there is a plug for a hairdryer and a large mirror so this made getting ready easy. The bed side tables have a plug/USB for phones chargers which some properties never have so this was great. You are no more than 10 mins walking to most restaurants in all directions to explore and the area itself is nice a quiet with a cafe just outside for coffee and food. The Terrace was a lovely treat to cool down with a large cushion in the shade or a few loungers in the sun & a plunge pool. You dont need towels as they are provided for outdoor use. Olga, thank you for welcoming us we had wonderful time and will be back soon. Love Andrew & Victoria Taylor xxx

- Nous avons passé un excellent séjour chez Olga. Elle a été très accueillante, disponible et attentive tout au long du séjour. Le logement était impeccable : très propre, parfaitement équipé et idéalement situé pour découvrir la ville à pied. Nous nous y sommes sentis comme chez nous. Je recommande vivement ce logement et j’y reviendrais avec plaisir lors d’un prochain passage à Séville.

- Our stay in Olga’s apartment was wonderful . She was a warm and responsive host, and the building (common areas) and private space were lovely. We loved the rooftop dipping pool and loungers! Also, the location is perfect—walkable to everywhere, yet not noisy or frenetic. We hope to return for a second visit soon! Muchas gracias, Olga! 🩷
- Joli logement avec balcons permettant une vue sur la place et l'église (clocher qui ne sonne pas la nuit!), très fonctionnel, à proximité à pieds des sites touristiques et de très bons restaurants

- Olga is an exemplary host!! She provides a gorgeous home away from home and is extremely invested in the comfort and happiness of her visitors. We left will full hearts and will definitely return! 5 stats all around:)
- Great location! The apartment is centrally located, clean, and well supplied. Olga was so kind and a joy to converse with! When we return to Sevilla, we would stay here again.

Supreme location, breathtaking views from spacious and lovely rooms in a beautiful building. - Just the best area - in the centre of the old city, but in a lovely quiet and elegant square. The building is exceptionally beautiful, and Olga is the most hospitable and charming of hosts. We only wish we could have stayed longer, and look forward to returning. The views are marvellous, the spaces excellent, and the bed extremely comfortable. Too busy enjoying the space to ask the question...
Olga was a fabulous host! The property w - There are no comments available for this review

Thuiskomen - Echt een heel fijn appartement op een toplocatie. Rustig, goed ingericht, heel aangename sfeer. Lekker plonsbadje op het dak. Kleinschalig. En als absolute top: gastvrouw Olga! Niet van toepassing

We loved staying here, and would definitely return! Great location, and very comfortable. - Beautiful apartment, with classic finishing, very nice bathroom, and functional kitchen. It was quiet, and in a great location. The hostess was very personable and made us most welcome! The couch is older, and not the most comfortable.
入住体验很棒 - 地理位置优越，房间配置齐全，还送了水果巧克力
Can't wait to go back. - Absolutely everything. There was absolutely nothing not to like.
Luxury apartment in the heart of the city! - The apartment was beautiful, extremely clean and in a great location . Nothing.

- Tout d'abord, un très grand merci à Olga pour sa grande bienveillance, gentillesse, et sa disponibilité quand nous avons eu besoin d'aide. Un accueil chaleureux tout au long de notre séjour. Olga a toujours le sourire 😃 😃 L'emplacement est idéal car très central par rapport à tous les quartiers de Séville. Les appartements sont top. Très propres et confortables, et très bien insonorisés. Que dire de plus : allez y et vous ne serez pas déçus.
Amaziang - A Anfitriã é de uma simpatia e educação surpreendente, a limpeza e conforto espetacular, a localização é perfeita, recomendo e anseio o próximo regresso.

Home away from home. - It was full of character. Located minutes from majority of the attractions in Sevilla and opens right on to a cluster of orange trees that leave the place smelling absolutely beautiful. Nothing.

- The location is excellent, right in the center on a cozy square. The bed is comfortable. We stayed on the top floor, and all the windows faced the terraces — a very cozy attic room under the roof. The kitchen has everything you need, and there is a large, comfortable bathroom. The terrace offers a view over Seville. All the main attractions are within walking distance, with plenty of cafés and restaurants nearby.
Enjoyable - The manager was very friendly and helpful and flexible,as well as the staff

Άριστη διαμονή σε έναν παραμυθένιο τόπο - Το κατάλυμα βρίσκεται σε εξαιρετική τοποθεσία και η Όλγα μας βοήθησε να αξιολογήσουμε ολα τα αξιοθέατα και να ανακαλύψουμε τα εστιατόρια που προσφέρουν υψηλή ποιότητα τοπικών γεύσεων.

Supreme location, breathtaking views from spacious and lovely rooms in a beautiful building. - Just the best area - in the centre of the old city, but in a lovely quiet and elegant square. The building is exceptionally beautiful, and Olga is the most hospitable and charming of hosts. We only wish we could have stayed longer, and look forward to returning. The views are marvellous, the spaces excellent, and the bed extremely comfortable. Too busy enjoying the space to ask the question...

Highly recommend this stay. - The location is exceptionally central and perfectly placed to explore Seville, with most major sights easily accessible on foot. Everything truly is within walking distance, which made getting around incredibly convenient. The property itself is very well maintained, spotless, and thoughtfully cared for. The rooms were beautiful, comfortable, and inviting, adding to an overall wonderful stay. The staff were consistently friendly, warm, and helpful, always ready to assist with anything we needed. A special mention to Olga, who went above and beyond by kindly staying with us and helping arrange a cab. Her support and genuine hospitality made a lasting impression on our experience. Nothing
- The location and the room is soo good
- Gentillesse disponibilité de l hôte La situation du logement est parfaite

- Creo que fue el mejor apartamento en el que me he quedado en toda España. He visitado la península más de 10 veces en los últimos 15 años. Además el trato y las atenciones de Olga fueron fenomenales. Siempre disponible para cualquier ayuda. Este lugar tiene detalles muy bien cuidados y prácticos que no he encontrado en otros lugares. Definitivamente el mejor Hotel Boutique. Pues no puedo pensar en nada.

Außergewöhnliche Atmosphäre, herzlichste Olga der Welt. - Die Atmosphäre der Unterkunft ist ganz wunderbar. Alles ist unglaublich liebevoll und ästhetisch gestaltet. Daher der ideale Ort für Menschen, die auf Achtsamkeit Wert legen, vom Eingangsbereich bis zu den Zimmern. Sehr viele außergewöhnliche Details. Inspirierend! Das Apartment liegt in einer Gasse an einem kleinen Platz, super zentral in der Stadt.Von hier aus ist alles gut zu Fuss erreichbar. Ein Supermarkt ist gleich um die Ecke und ein Aldi in der Nähe. In der Küche gibt es Geschirr, Besteck, einen Wassekocher, einen Toster, eine Kapselkaffeemaschine, einen Kühlschrank, eine Waschmaschine, Spülmittel und ein Schwämmchen. Man kann sich selbst Frühstück machen oder auch etwas vorab bestellen und dann kommen lassen. Im Schrank ist außerdem ein Bügeleisen und ein Wäscheständer. Wichtig: Auf den Balkon außen darf nichts zum Trocknen aufgehängt werden. Das Bad hat wunderschöne gestaltete Steinfliesen. Handtücher, Duschgel und Haarshampoo sowie Bodylotion und Flüssigseife sowie ein Föhn (im Schlafzimmerschrank) sind da. Für warmes Wasser in der Dusche muß man etwas Geduld haben, es dauert ein wenig bis es warm wird. Das Bett ist sehr komfortabel, die Decke gross genug für Zwei. Im Wohnzimmer gibt es ein Ledersofa einen kleinen Glastisch und einen prima Fernseher. Olga, hat uns sehr herzlich empfangen und uns das kostenlose WLAN eingestellt und uns hilfreiche Tipps gegeben. Sie hat uns auch ein Taxi zum Flughafen organisiert. (Taxi:29 Euro) Das war auch zuverlässig dann da. Jedenfalls: wir würden sofort wieder hierher kommen. Wir waren Ende März da und hatten 4 wundervolle Tage mit unglaublichen Eindrücken. Danke Olga!!!! Uns hat wirklich alles super gut gefallen. Ein Schneidbrett und ein persönliches Geschirrtuch würde ich nächstes Mal mitbringen. Das gab es aus hygienischen Gründen dort nicht. Die Dachterrasse öffnet erst im April. Für uns war das aber kein Problem.Wer darauf Wert legt, sollte das beachten.

Beautiful accomodation very well located with the perfect host - The warm reception by Olga and the fast communication, all her tips where to eat and what to see, and the beautiful accomodation in the heart of the old town. We will come back for sure! Nothing
- Lovely apartment with terrace to enjoy the sun. Olga the manager was super, so friendly and helpful.
- Olga, the manager is outstanding. The location is close to everything. The property is clean, comfortable, and well appointed. Nothing

Comfortable stylish apartment and in a great location - Beautiful penthouse apartment, in a perfect location with a short walk to local attractions, restaurants, bars and shops. Quiet location. The apartment had everything we needed for our 4 night stay. We enjoyed the large roof terrace. The host was very helpful and welcoming throughout our stay

We had a truly wonderful time and would 100% revisit stay at the CH Apartments again. - Olga was the perfect host - wonderfully welcoming and helpful, with such a friendly manner. We had everything we needed in the stunning apartment; it was extremely clean and very well furnished, and the location was amazing for anywhere we wanted to walk to within the main city and its tourist attractions, bars and restaurants, public transport, etc. The rooftop sun terrace with pool was a huge added bonus. I can think of nothing that could have been improved or that did not meet our requirements. Olga provided details of local attractions and was always around to help or very quick to respond to any request. I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND staying in this apartment building.
Appartement très agréable et très bien placé - Très bel endroit, appartement propre, piscine sur le toit très agréable. L’emplacement est parfait, nous avons pu tout faire à pied. Et accueil au top !
- Decoración + limpieza Nada me justo todo
Super hôtel et super accueil - Accueil vue chambre Position de l’hôtel Une super expérience Rien

- Nuestra estancia en CH Apartments Boutique fue simplemente maravillosa. La ubicación es perfecta y el apartamento estaba impecable, cuidado hasta el último detalle, con una cama comodísima! Pero lo más especial fue Olga, una persona encantadora y atenta. Olvidé mi collar y tuvo la enorme amabilidad de enviármelo rápidamente, un gesto que valoro muchísimo. ¡Olga, eres la mejor! Estaremos encantados de volver.
Fantástica estancia - La ubicación, la estancia la limpieza… muy acogedor. La propietaria un encanto Nada
Olga was very helpful and made our stay feel really special. - Very pretty and apartment was large. Location was amazing. Leaving.
- La disponibilité et l'amabilité d'Olga. L'appartement était parfait.
- Very beautiful!!!! And a super host Olga! We cone back!

Maravilhoso - Primeiro a Olga, sempre muito simpática. O hotel é um charme. Aparência antiga e decoração impecável! Ficamos no quarto do térreo, atrás da recepção, que era muito grande. Contava com o quarto em si, de uma sala integrada com uma cozinha muito equipada (inclusive com máquina de lavar roupas), um banheiro muito amplo além de um pátio interno com uma fonte. Maravilhoso, um apartamento de grande. Cama confortável e quarto silencioso do jeito que gostamos para descansar. Hotel fica muito próximos às Setas, uma caminhada rápida até a catedral. Tem bons restaurantes próximos também, Olga dá as dicas. Não tem nada que não tenha gostado. Não fez qualquer diferença pra gente mas não conta com um recepção 24h. Mas isso realmente não foi problema, como eu disse, a Olga está sempre disponível no whatsapp.
Amazing. - Everything was absolutely perfect, would highly recommend!
Excellent stay - Location, friendly staff, clean facilities

We have travelled a lot and we hit the Jackpot with CH Apartments… Love love loved it! - I can not say enough good things about CH Apartments and Olga who hosted us. We had the top floor apartment and it was the most amazing place we have stayed. . . It wasn’t a brand new place, it was the highest experience. We loved it. A lift opening into our apartment, a rooftop terrace to ourselves, with two levels, a beautiful view over the plaza and a beautiful church right outside our bedroom window/door (don’t worry the bells don’t ring overnight). There are markets and supermarkets nearby and we were self contained for breakfast which we loved (but the option is there if you want it provided). And the best feature was Olga who is not only lovely and welcoming but every single recommendation for food, drink and sights (and where not to go) were 110% spot on. Thank you Olga, we miss you!! We miss Saville. I have no bad words! It was excellent and all our needs were met and Olga was always available to us for any needs.

Charming, welcoming and excellent value. - Olga, the host, was incredibly helpful and charming and gave excellent restaurant recommendations (where the locals eat, rather that tourist hotspots). The property was beautiful and the location was perfect.

Situated in an easily accessible , interesting, lively part of the old city - fantastic, base . - Olga, the host was exceptional - so warm, kind and thoughtful and yet highly knowledgeable and professional. Nothing was too much trouble. The pre Nothing really - all round it was an excellent experience. It was a very comfortable base from which to enjoy the delights of Seville.

A short but very lovely stay in Seville 🌆 - Our apartment was beautiful and clean and had a wonderful big bed. The views over the square from both the living room and bedroom were so lovely. Olga is an extremely nice host and made sure we knew the best places to see in Seville. Just wished we could have stayed longer! Nothing

Would 100% stay here again and reccomend to friends - Everything! The apartment was so well appointed with ample space. The location was brilliant and is right on a very lively square. Olga was so lovely and showed us all of the places we needed to visit. Nothing!

Perfect stay! - The staff were super helpful and efficient - the location was perfect! The beds were comfortable and the shower was excellent! Only thing for improvement would be to have another mirror rather than the only one being in bathroom - but was definitely not a problem!

Beautiful accommodation in the heart of Seville with an elegant, luxurious feel and a warm welcome. - It’s a beautiful place. Very centrally located and handy for all the sites. It feels very elegant and historic but has all of the modern day conveniences you could want. We liked everything about the property. The bed was exceptionally comfortable, the rooms were beautiful, the bathroom luxurious and elegant. Olga was so welcoming and warm, incredibly helpful and going above and beyond to provide advice, suggestions for restaurants and sights to see, and answering any question. Her attention to detail and care for her guests is wonderful.
- Adorable place to stay. Very elegantly furnished.

- The room had a severe ant infestation spreading from the washroom to the bed, rendering the room uninhabitable, leading us to evacuate and seek alternative accommodation, after which the host refused a refund. The issue was reported on the first night, after which a cleaning attempt aggravated the infestation, resulting in ants covering the washroom walls making the washroom unusable for the first night. A further cleaning was arranged the following day. However, upon return, the room had a strong disinfectant odor, ants were still present in the washroom, and now a whole colony in the bed too! At that point, the room was not fit for occupancy. We were forced to check out due to the conditions of the property. The host waived the additional fee for my sister, but later refused a refund, stating we checked out too late. This is unreasonable given that the departure was caused by an uninhabitable condition and repeated failed remediation efforts. And we had relied on their earlier assurance that the issue would be taken care of while we were out. The handling of the situation was unprofessional, and the cleanliness and habitability issues were not resolved at any point during the stay. The experience caused significant mental stress throughout the stay.

The experience caused significant mental stress throughout the stay.

list.prop: AT-6V Ático c/ Terraza Privada Verano
list.txt: - Très bien

Disappointed😪 - The location perfect. Manager Olga very helpful. Very quiet. Very large comfortable bed. Very big shower and bathroom. The apartment says with Terrace. I booked it because I believed the terrace was on top floor as the information says pool view, Landmark view, City view, innercourt yard view. Yes if you go to the 3rd floor and stand on the roof. The terrace is a very small area in outside area a room converted to a terrace type thing..impossible to sit and relax out there. Furniture old and rusty also. Ventalation to the apartment comes from an open skylight way up on top of the 3rd story building. There are two big windows looking on to the terrace straight on to a painted brick wall. The terrace part is pretty to look at due to the quirkyness of it but thats all. Oh when it rains the skylight is open and the rain goes into the little paddle pool thing in the centre of terrace. No ventilation in bathroom (bathroom/showerroom)very big, and very nice) so the condensation has to go somewhere hence mould smell in the bedroom area I think. Lighting very limited in every room, no natural light, but situated to give impression of incoming light. The rooms were very clean. I cannot speak for the other apartments in the building, room 1, was where we stayed.
- Eher düsteres Apartment im Parterre, ohne Fenster.
- Eher düsteres Apartment im Parterre, ohne Fenster.
- Outdated . Sofa was 50 year old. Room 1 was humid. Pool in the room was not clean, not appealing. Poor lighting. Expensive for the quality . Poor value . Nice hostess however .

Oui pour Séville - Très bien situé, directement sur jolie place publique avec 2 restaurants. Aucune luminosité, alors que les photos nous donnais une tout autre impression. Nous voulions un appartement typique des vieux quartiers,mais avec un certain confort. Malheureusement, cet appartement a besoin d’un bon coup de jeunesse et cela en vaudrait la peine, étant donné son emplacement plus que génial. Les éclairages sont à revoir à défaut de pouvoir agrandir le fenestrage. Le sèche-linge ne fonctionnait pas. La climatisation était déficiente dans un appartement relativement humide. Le mobilier était défraîchie. Il y avait une petite terrasse avec un bain tourbillon, mais qui ne fonctionnait pas. Loin de nous l’idée de nuire aux propriétaires, mais nous avons quand même payé 400$ la nuit,et à ce prix,nous nous attendions à des prestations bien supérieures.
- Excelente ubicacion, puedes ir caminando a todos los puntos de interes y hay un aparcamiento publico cerca

Excellent stay, highly recommended. - Great location, central but free of traffic. Olga is a great host, full of local knowledge and very helpful guiding where to visit. The penthouse includes 3 rooftop patios with a separate plunge pool and spa!
- La Posizione L'Appartamento La signora che ci ha accolte C'è tutto ciò che serve
- Gorgeous apartment. Great setting. Lovely rooftop plunge pool.

Magnifique séjour à Seville ! - Très bien situé pour visiter tous les différents quartiers de Seville, également la petite piscine sur le toit de l’immeuble pour se détendre après une journée de visites… Rien …. Nous avons tout aimé !!!
- Perfect location. Beautiful apartment. Wonderful host. Very welcoming. Would return anytime!
A lovely haven in the heart of everything - Great welcome and Olga really is very welcoming. Ideally located with a very spacious apartment.

- Great location, penthouse apartment with fantastic private rooftop in March. Comfortable beds, good shower, sufficient storage room. Very nice, friendly host providing helpful tips and supporting logistics. Some basic kitchen supplies, such as olive oil, salt, pepper, etc. would be nice.

Personal zuvorkommend und herzlich - Es war ein sehr schönes Herrenhaus, Zimmer mit Höhen Holz Decken auf dem Boden Steinfliesen, großes Bad und Patio mit Wasserspeicher. Feuchtigkeit Hang in der Luft.

Great apartment in a beautiful location - The apartment was in a great location in beautiful building in the Old Town set in a pretty square. The bed was very comfortable and we had everything we needed for our stay. Within easy walking distance to all the monuments. Olga was exceptional and very helpful and recommended us lots of places to eat and drink. She made us feel very welcome and we would highly recommend staying here. We can’t fault the property…
- Da atenção dos funcionários.
- Perfect location. Beautiful apartment. Wonderful host. Very welcoming. Would return anytime!

Great apartment in a beautiful location - The apartment was in a great location in beautiful building in the Old Town set in a pretty square. The bed was very comfortable and we had everything we needed for our stay. Within easy walking distance to all the monuments. Olga was exceptional and very helpful and recommended us lots of places to eat and drink. She made us feel very welcome and we would highly recommend staying here. We can’t fault the property…
- Da atenção dos funcionários.
A lovely haven in the heart of everything - Great welcome and Olga really is very welcoming. Ideally located with a very spacious apartment.

Personal zuvorkommend und herzlich - Es war ein sehr schönes Herrenhaus, Zimmer mit Höhen Holz Decken auf dem Boden Steinfliesen, großes Bad und Patio mit Wasserspeicher. Feuchtigkeit Hang in der Luft.

- Great location, penthouse apartment with fantastic private rooftop in March. Comfortable beds, good shower, sufficient storage room. Very nice, friendly host providing helpful tips and supporting logistics. Some basic kitchen supplies, such as olive oil, salt, pepper, etc. would be nice.

Excellent stay, highly recommended. - Great location, central but free of traffic. Olga is a great host, full of local knowledge and very helpful guiding where to visit. The penthouse includes 3 rooftop patios with a separate plunge pool and spa!
- Excelente ubicacion, puedes ir caminando a todos los puntos de interes y hay un aparcamiento publico cerca

- A very good refurbishment of a grand building. The apartment and facilities could hardly be any better and were a fine base for exploring Seville. We had a lovely welcome from Olga, who went out of her way to help us. Top class air conditioning: and this was with outside temperatures in the high-30s. The bathroom was luxurious and it was great to step in to a cool shower after being out in the heat.
- De ambiance/zwembad/ligging en de gastvrouw
Fantastisch verblijf in mooie stad! - Mooi en net appartement, goede locatie aan pleintje, zeer vriendelijke gastvrouw (Olga) die snel reageert op vragen en goede tips geeft. Aanrader! nvt

Wonderful - We had a wonderful stay in Seville and couldn’t have picked a better place. The location was absolutely perfect; central enough to walk everywhere, yet still peaceful and comfortable after long days exploring the city. What really made the experience special, though, was the warmth and kindness of the host. She was incredibly welcoming, attentive, and genuinely cared that we experienced the best of Seville. Her food recommendations were excellent and ended up being some of our favourite meals of the trip; authentic places we never would have found ourselves. The apartment itself was clean, stylish, and very comfortable, making it easy to relax after busy days wandering through the city. Overall, this stay added so much to our experience of Seville and we would absolutely come back again. Highly recommended! One area for improvement would be the mosquitoes at night. We unfortunately got quite a few bites during our stay. It would really help to have mosquito protection on the windows or stronger mosquito sprays/repellents available in the apartment, especially during warmer months.
- La Posizione L'Appartamento La signora che ci ha accolte C'è tutto ciò che serve

Magnifique séjour à Seville ! - Très bien situé pour visiter tous les différents quartiers de Seville, également la petite piscine sur le toit de l’immeuble pour se détendre après une journée de visites… Rien …. Nous avons tout aimé !!!
- Gorgeous apartment. Great setting. Lovely rooftop plunge pool.
Perfect location, great host, lovely place! - Decorated so nicely, great location, lovely pool, amazing terrace, Olga is so great! Can’t think of anything

Calm oasis in a great city - The location was perfect, in the heart of the city with the major tourist sites within 15mins walk or less. Aldi 2mins away to get supplies. Just outside on the little plaza was a great tapas bar "Santa Marta" where the locals eat. Plaza concordia car park 5min walk away. We booked it on Parkimeter as was cheaper for 5 days. Apartment was on the second floor facing the street so we had the cute little balconies with view of the church and plaza. Very clean and spacious. Kitchen had all you need to make a nice breakfast. Comfy large bed. Wardrobe and drawers so you can unpack properly and get rid of suitcases. Safe. Aircon. Bathroom very clean with excellent shower. The roof terrace was a great place to rest after stomping the streets all day. The plunge pool and shaded seating was a relief. Towels provided too. Also another great skyline view - with the church bell tower right there and the "Setas" also visible. Olga was very helpful on arrival giving all the information we needed about local places to eat and where the tourist sites and Aldi were. She was also available via WhatsApp if needed and responded super quick to my questions. The whole residence was like an oasis as you enter through the big wooden door into a relaxing lobby area. The centre is full height atrium up to the terrace.

Gorgeous stay in Seville old town - The location was brilliant, within walking distance to everywhere and had loads of good spots to eat nearby. Rooftop pool was lovely, ended up there when it got too hot to walk around. The building itself is beautiful too, but above all Olga was a wonderful host! Nothing!

- The position The entrance way Lack of outside area. We had spefucally asked for a balcony and understood we were to get one overlooking the courtyard. We would not have booked if we had realised that was not going to happen.

- The hostess was wonderful. Our luggage went missing and she went out of her way to help us. The place has a lot of character, is tastefully decorated, extremely clean and comfortable. Large bathroom with walk in shower and little private courtyard with a jacuzzi ! Very central and gives over a lovely pedestrian plaza with nice cafes. There are several flats in the house. We had the ground floor one which is quite dark (better for the summer). It is the only reason why i did not give a 10. If you want more light, ask for a flat with balcony.

Ótima opção em Sevilha - Localização, simpatia e atenção da Olga com dicas de passeios e restaurantes. Apartamento é bem completo. A pressão do chuveiro é fraca. O site do Booking deveria informar que a acomodação não possui esquema de limpeza, nem troca de toalhas.

lastPos.txt: - Olga, first of all thank you so much for being such a great host. You went above and beyond my expectations of an Airbnb host. Olga gave us great recommendations of food, nightlife, place to stay away from like tourist traps. Her place is located in the middle of the city so everything is walkable. I highly recommend anyone to stay here ….cant wait to visit again.
